daily.today_energy: Your vibe is giving introspective innovator energy. Mercury's nudging you to pause and really listen to what your intuition's been trying to say. Trust the quiet moments today—they're where the magic lives.
daily.love: There's a softness in the air around your connections. Whether you're coupled up or solo, lean into vulnerability. Someone (or yourself) needs to hear what you've been holding back. Authenticity is your love language rn.
daily.career: Creative solutions are flowing through you today. That random idea you've been sitting on? It might actually be the move. Your energy is aligned with taking one small risk that could shift things. Go for it.
daily.health: Your body's asking for presence over perfection. Skip the intense workout if it doesn't feel right—maybe a walk, some stretching, or just stillness is what you actually need. Listen to what feels nourishing.

weekly.overview: This week's energy is pulling you toward authenticity, Aquarius. You're feeling that familiar urge to break free from what doesn't serve you anymore. Trust those intuitive hits about who and what deserve your time.
weekly.love: Venus is giving you permission to be a little vulnerable with someone who actually gets you. If you've been holding back, this is your sign to let them see the real you. Connection over perfection, always.
weekly.career: Your big ideas are hitting different right now—people are actually listening. Channel this momentum into pitching that project or having that conversation you've been sitting on. Your voice matters way more than you think.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for more movement and less scrolling. Even small bursts of activity will shift your whole vibe. Pay attention to what makes you feel energized versus drained this week and adjust accordingly.
